src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Added IllegalArgumentException to the catch block to handle potential parsing or validation errors from the client.
Clean up imports that are no longer used after switching to the new status code API.
src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.human_impl: Removed static imports for `CLIENT_ERROR` and `SERVER_ERROR` from `org.springframework.http.HttpStatus.Series`.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/LottoApplicat.general_idea: Removed imports and static field related to Testcontainers MongoDB container, likely moving container management to a base class or removing the test dependency.
src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/LottoApplicat.human_impl: Removed imports for org.testcontainers and the static MongoDBContainer field definition.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/LottoApplicat.general_idea: Added static import for JUnit 5 assertions to enable concise assertion usage in tests.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/integration/f.general_idea: Updated the WireMock stub URL to match the new randomizing microservice endpoint structure.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/integration/n.general_idea: Updated the hardcoded remote endpoint URL in the integration test to match the new microservice API path.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency from 1.18.22 to 1.18.34 for compatibility with newer Java versions.
Remove explicit JUnit Jupiter Engine version property as it is managed by Spring Boot 3.
Remove explicit Mockito Core dependency to rely on the version managed by Spring Boot starter-test.
Remove explicit finalName configuration from the build plugin section, likely relying on default artifact naming.
Reorder dependency declarations and add section comments for better readability and structure.
